programme.title: WWE Raw

programme.desc: The house is fumigated and the girls move into a Miami Beach hotel. Previously, Blanche had won three tickets to see the opening of Burt Reynolds new movie and passes to the party held afterwards where they could meet him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine
programme.desc: Dorothy dumps a depressed Stan on Blanche so that she can go out with a naval officer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: It's a Miserable Life
programme.desc: The girls petition to save an old oak tree on the property of a hateful woman.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Sit down with actress Rosalind Chao from 'Mulan.' Chadwick Boyd is in our kitchen making a skillet shrimp dinner.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Guests include Hallmark star Candace Cameron Bure and actress Skyler Shaye from the Hallmark Movies & Mysteries movie 'JL Family Ranch: The Wedding Gift.'

programme.title: Movie: My Favorite Bachelor
programme.desc: A shy writer has to go out on a date with a different man every month in order to write an article for her company's 'Man for Every Month' blog.

programme.title: Movie: The Secret Ingredient
programme.desc: A small-town baker is surprised with an invite to compete in a baking show. While there, she runs into her ex-fiancé.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Butt and Pancake Head
programme.desc: One of Cartman's body parts becomes famous overnight and rivals the popularity of another superstar.

programme.title: The Office: Back From Vacation
programme.desc: Still in vacation mode after his trip to Jamaica, Michael tries to hang on to his relaxed island vibe despite a wave of office hassles. It all becomes too much when an e-mail containing a racy vacation photo is forwarded around the office.

programme.title: The Office: Traveling Salesmen
programme.desc: On Andy's suggestion, Michael has staffers team up for sales calls, leading to some interesting, insightful moments in the field. Meanwhile, Dwight attempts to cover for Angela after she misses an important deadline.

programme.title: The Office: The Return
programme.desc: Oscar returns from his vacation with mixed emotions on whether or not he wants to be a part of the office. Meanwhile, Andy takes advantage of recent events to get closer to Michael. Jim turns to Karen and Pam for help to stage a prank on a new target.

programme.title: The Office: Ben Franklin
programme.desc: Acting on bad advice he received from his friend Todd Packer, Michael brings two 'adult' performers into the office in honour of Phyllis's wedding shower. Meanwhile, Karen confronts Pam about her past with Jim.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: The Office: Business School
programme.desc: Ryan invites Michael to be a guest speaker at his business school. Meanwhile, Dwight battles a bat that gets loose in the office while Pam invites co-workers to her first art show.

programme.title: The Office: Cocktails
programme.desc: Michael and Jan go public with their relationship during a party at their CFO's home. At the party, Jim meets Karen's ex. Meanwhile, the rest of the office decides to go to happy hour for drinks.

programme.title: The Office: The Negotiation
programme.desc: Darryl decides to meet with Michael to negotiate a pay increase. Meanwhile, Jim deals with the consequences of Pam's confession to Roy.

programme.title: The Office: Safety Training
programme.desc: Andy returns to the office after several weeks of anger management training, determined to make a fresh start with all the Dunder Mifflin employees. On safety training day, Michael and Dwight try to illuminate the true dangers of the workplace.

programme.title: The Office: Product Recall
programme.desc: The office is in crisis mode after a large shipment of Dunder-Mifflin paper is accidentally sent out with an obscene watermark. In an effort to manage the media, Michael holds an impromptu press conference.

programme.title: The Office: Women's Appreciation
programme.desc: After Phyllis gets flashed in the parking lot, Dwight sets out to improve on-site security. Michael uses the situation as a pretence to bond with the female employees at the mall and to get advice on how to break up with Jan.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: September 21, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: Beach Games
programme.desc: Michael is being considered for a job at corporate and has to recommend his replacement.

programme.title: South Park: Grey Dawn
programme.desc: With South Park's senior citizens behind the wheel, more than a few farmer's markets have been mowed down. Unwilling to surrender their driver's licenses, the elderly fight back.

programme.title: South Park: Le Petit Tourette
programme.desc: Cartman discovers the joys of having Tourette's syndrome. Drunk with the power of saying whatever he wants without getting in trouble for it, he lines up National TV Coverage to take advantage of his new life with no filters.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: September 21, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: About Last Night...
programme.desc: While the country celebrates the outcome of the election, the new President-elect catches everyone off guard when he arrives at the White House prematurely.

programme.title: South Park: AWESOM-O
programme.desc: Cartman plans to learn all of Butters' innermost secrets and then use them against him, by pretending to be Butters' new best friend, a robot named AWESOM-O.

programme.title: South Park: Two Days Before the Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: After a global warming state of emergency is declared in South Park, the world's largest beaver dam breaks and floods the town of Beaverton. The people of South Park must figure out who they can blame before anyone can be saved in the adjacent town.

programme.title: South Park: The Tale of Scrotie McBoogerballs
programme.desc: The boys are given a controversial book to read in school and it inspires them to write one of their own. They convince Butters to take credit for the filth that they have written, but become jealous when he is hailed as a literary genius.

programme.title: South Park: You Have 0 Friends
programme.desc: When Kyle begs Stan to 'friend' him, Stan gets sucked into the world of Facebook. Kyle gets a hard lesson about the politics of Facebook when he friends the least popular kid in school.

programme.title: South Park: T.M.I.
programme.desc: Cartman throws a fit when the boys' penis sizes are posted on the school bulletin board, and is sent to anger management therapy.

programme.desc: The eldest brother in a Boston Brahmin family is found in the harbour dead after an apparent sailing accident. Maura's close connection with the family and Jane's resentment over their wealth threaten to derail the investigation.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: I Kissed a Girl
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate what appears to be a hate crime: the brutal assault and murder of a woman leaving a lesbian bar. With Jane going undercover, they hope to lure the killer out in the open.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Born to Run
programme.desc: The Boston Marathon turns into a crime scene when a shooter begins targeting runners. Racing to catch the killer before another shooting, Jane and Maura must conduct their investigation in secret to avoid panic.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: I'm Your Boogie Man
programme.desc: A body discovered in a park appears to be the work of Charles Hoyt, the imprisoned serial killer who once abducted and nearly murdered Jane. As Maura struggles to get inside the mind of the killer, Jane must keep her fear in check.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Beast in Me
programme.desc: When an identity thief with no apparent identity of his own is found murdered in his car, the investigation leads Jane into Boston's checkered past. A startling discovery about the victim sends Maura on a personal quest.

programme.desc: After an undercover cop working a narcotics-smuggling sting is shot dead, the killers next turn their sites on Boston homicide headquarters, leaving Jane, Maura and Frankie Jr. trapped in a fight for survival.

programme.desc: Jane and Maura's relaxing day at an outdoor spa is anything but when they discover the murder of a pregnant woman serving as a surrogate mother. Soon the hunt is on the find the baby's biological parents.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sailor Man
programme.desc: Shortly after sailors invade the streets of Boston for Fleet Week a young girl is found dead. Frost's father, a Navy Admiral, comes to town, causing tension with his son. Maura goes on a date with Angela's mechanic.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Ghani/ Stallone
programme.desc: A free-spirited mother swaps place with a straight-laced stay-at-home mom.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Spolansky/Bradley
programme.desc: Jodi Spolanky, a 37-year-old New York mom swaps lives with 45-year-old mom Lynn Bradley.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Bittner/ Reimer
programme.desc: A strict, vegetarian, former navy wife trades places with a junk-food eating mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Final Days of Whitney Houston
programme.desc: New details surrounding Whitney Houston's last days and her tumultuous relationship with Bobby Brown are revealed.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Tom Petty: Mysterious Ending
programme.desc: News of the sudden passing of celebrated rock musician Tom Petty shocked fans worldwide, but a deeper look into the music legend’s life reveals physical and emotional afflictions that may have led to his death at age 66.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer

programme.desc: Six weeks after jumping bail in Galveston, Texas, Robert Durst is caught on a store security camera in Pennsylvania shoplifting a sandwich and is quickly sent back to Galveston to stand trial for the murder of his neighbor, Morris Black.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am The Zodiac
programme.desc: He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues, threats of violence and most famously, ciphers that were supposed to lead police to his identity, but mostly went nowhere.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Life is a Gamble
programme.desc: The MSO family loads up the hot rods and heads to Vegas to meet up with King Donnie and a group of West Coast racers. Molly and Chelsea step up to take on the challenge but the roads are unusually slick, making it a struggle to bring home a payday.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Revenge Racing
programme.desc: JJ calls up a group of racers who have all beaten the MSO before and challenges them all to a rematch. Then high altitudes wreak havoc on tunes and motors in Idaho as NOLA surges ahead in the NPK standings.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: Everyday I'm Hustling
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: The MSO continues battling it out against teams that have beaten them in the past. They're down after one night of racing so the odds are stacked against them.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Mile High Memphis
programme.desc: JJ has the MSO face off against the best small-tire racers he's ever seen: themselves! Then Team NOLA preps for another night of success as the racers take on the tricky Rocky Mountain altitude at Bandimere Speedway in Colorado.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Performance Pinto
programme.desc: The team continues converting the rusted '71 Pinto into a European performance car despite the passed deadline. Unwilling to compromise on the original vision, Chad presses on both day and night to get his creation ready for its dramatic big city reveal.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: For Kings and Queens
programme.desc: Chad uses a 1935 Hupmobile for an elegant 1930s speedster to debut at a charity golf tournament.

programme.desc: JJ has the MSO face off against the best small-tire racers he's ever seen: themselves! Then Team NOLA preps for another night of success as the racers take on the tricky Rocky Mountain altitude at Bandimere Speedway in Colorado.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: For Kings and Queens
programme.desc: Chad uses a 1935 Hupmobile for an elegant 1930s speedster to debut at a charity golf tournament.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Mayday Mayday
programme.desc: The Coast Guard responds to a Mayday call as captains and crew brace for the loss of friends during a brutal winter storm. Sig and Monte track an Opilio hoard at the Russian line, and the clock is ticking for Wild Bill and Junior during the cod derby.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Cold War Heating Up
programme.desc: As the crab biomass migrates across the Russian line, Josh and Casey dump 175 pots on the border. Sig and Mandy go dark ship in towering seas. Jake's new deckhand gets injured while Junior attempts to steam through False Pass in a nighttime blizzard.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Harm's Way
programme.desc: Facing a 500-mile wide Siberian storm, Josh takes a big risk to keep the Cornelia Marie crew safe. Junior loses control of his rudders putting his boat at the mercy of heavy seas. Jake's greenhorn problems get a lot worse when one clogs the toilet.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Chase Boat Rescue
programme.desc: Listing heavily and taking on water, Junior calls on chase boat rescue for the first time in series history. Wild Bill sends Nick 20 feet off the deck in spite of his fear of heights. Josh and Casey hit a massive wave that knocks out greenhorn Maria.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dutch Harbor Double Cross
programme.desc: On the Summer Bay there's hell to pay when Bill's backup block goes missing. Cornelia Marie skippers Josh and Casey navigate a tenuous partnership at the Russian line. Weighed down by three full tanks, Sig puts a heavy Northwestern in Mandy's hands.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bomb Cyclone
programme.desc: The Wizard catches fire in a violent storm known as a bomb cyclone. Josh and Casey attempt to fish in 30-foot seas, while two rogue waves slam the Southern Wind. Wild Bill grinds his crew 72 straight hours bringing himself to the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Crash
programme.desc: Battling exhaustion, Wild Bill and his crew face the full wrath of the bomb cyclone. A snapped tendon puts the Summer Bay down a man. Josh gambles on crab-rich grounds in a costly venture north. An injured Mac fights to get Junior through the storm.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: As an injury knocks Sig out of his wheelhouse, Mandy takes the helm to face a disgruntled Northwestern crew. On the Wizard, damaged hydraulics and an umbilical hernia deal Keith a double gut punch. Josh and Casey suffer tragedy on the Cornelia Marie.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: Stuffed pots come at a price as Jake scrambles to repair a slack tank before it kills his crab or capsizes the Saga. Josh and Casey's rudder fails in heavy traffic and Wild Bill's new greenhorn makes an easy target for an out-of-control picking hook.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Danger Close
programme.desc: Josh and Casey race to haul pots as engine failure threatens their delivery window. As seawater destroys his hydraulic motors, Junior attempts a risky high seas delivery of three new motors. Harley and his crew bang heads over his fishing strategy.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Like Father Like Daughter
programme.desc: Sig and Mandy conspire to get Jake to do their prospecting, but the former deckhand seizes the moment to fill his own tanks. The Wizard crew must break through ice to rush Keith to a doctor. Junior fears the worst as a deckhand falls from the stack.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Rogue Wave Juggernaut
programme.desc: A rare weather event churns up rogue waves as supermoon tides collide with a cyclonic snowstorm. Josh and Casey face a 55-foot monster, while Jake risks capsizing to repair his rudder in unruly seas. Monte's big move north pays off in massive pots.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: To Love and to Obey?
programme.desc: Elizabeth's brother threatens her wedding with Andrei while Kalani and Asuelu's families go head to head. Angela receives shocking news and Paul and Karine say their goodbyes. Later, Larissa's surgery does not go as expected.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: Point of No Return
programme.desc: Larissa's plastic surgery transformation stuns her friends. Andrei confronts Charlie at the wedding. Kalani and Asuelu reach a breaking point. Colt tells Debbie to back off. Syngin considers staying in South Africa. Tragedy strikes Angela's family.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: B90 Strikes Back!: Hard Habit To Break
programme.desc: David tries to get closer to Lana. Avery says goodbye to Ash. Geoffrey finds himself caught in the middle of a sticky situation. Ed returns home. Stephanie reunites with her mom, and drama ensues when Lisa meets with Usman's elders.

programme.title: Darcey & Stacey: Inside the Episode: Caught on Tape

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Shy Kitties

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Blades of Deal

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn of the Undead

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: Da Vinci's Armageddon
programme.desc: Was Da Vinci a great philosopher? Artist? Engineer? Or was he a secret prophet? Did he manage to predict through visions the end of the world, visions that haunted him until the end of his life?

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: Doomsday Hieroglyphs
programme.desc: The great pyramids in Egypt both amazed and mystified the people for centuries. A look at their design that revealed architectural prophesies that contain profound messages about an end to our future.

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: Son of Nostradamus
programme.desc: A secret manuscript hidden in the Vatican was found in 1994, and it revealed a previously unknown apocalyptic prophecy. Where did the book come from and who wrote it?

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: Secrets of the Seven Seals
programme.desc: The Book of Revelation is one of the most terrifying and controversial books of the Bible, it states that mankind's end will come over a seven-year period that sees Jesus coming back for his final battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: Satan's Army
programme.desc: Less then 100 years after the birth of Christ, John the Apostle had a vision of Satan's final war against God.

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: The Apocalypse Code
programme.desc: Sir Isaac Newton predicted a shocking new date of the Apocalypse. Though he was famous for discovering gravity and laws of motion, few knew he also possessed a very dark, mysterious side and an obsession with alchemy and Biblical prophecy.

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: Armageddon Battle Plan
programme.desc: In 1947, in the desert near the Dead Sea, some ancient scrolls were discovered that predict a future war that will end the world.

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: The Rapture
programme.desc: When millions of people all over the world vanish, the biblical prophecy known as the Rapture will be fulfilled. A flood of unimaginable horrors will await those that survive.

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: Fatima's Lost Prophecy
programme.desc: In 1917 three young children from the small town of Fatima, Portugal claimed to be instruments of the divine prophecy. They reported being visited by the Virgin Mary, and tell their visions of death and destruction.

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: The Third Antichrist
programme.desc: Nostradamus saw the arrival of the three antichrists that would plague mankind. Who are they and when will they actually come? Is it possible to decode Nostradamus' visions in time to ward off the apocalypse?

programme.desc: A woman accused of murdering her newborn claims that a wild dingo killed the child.

programme.desc: Two actors engage in a relationship that parallels the characters they are portraying in a film, which is the story of a romance between a gentleman and a tainted woman in Victorian England.

programme.title: Movie: Up

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sorry to Father You

programme.title: Raven's Home: Cali Dreams

programme.title: Raven's Home: Adolessons
programme.desc: Booker seeks guidance from Devon as he begins adolescence. Raven and Tess help Nia deal with her first failing grade in school. Chelsea starts online dating with Levi's support.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Close Shave

programme.title: Jessie: Dance, Dance Resolution

programme.title: Jessie: What a Steal

programme.desc: When a missing M16 Officer is linked to a murdered petty officer, Gibbs sends Quinn and Bishop to Philadelphia to work with M16 Officer Clayton Reeves. Also, Quinn painfully recounts the NCIS case that made her leave field work.

programme.title: NCIS: Homefront
programme.desc: When a 14-year-old foils a home invasion, Gibbs suspects the teenager is withholding pertinent details. Also, Director Vance and Senior FBI Agent Fornell travel to London as part of the ongoing escaped British spy case.

programme.title: NCIS: Dead Letter
programme.desc: The NCIS team, alongside the FBI and MI6, continue an international manhunt for an escaped British spy who has left one colleague fighting for their life in ICU.

programme.title: NCIS: Family First
programme.desc: The NCIS team, the FBI and M16 continue an international manhunt for an escaped British spy who is targeting current and former agents.

programme.title: NCIS: Rogue
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates a deadly car explosion in D.C. that connects to NCIS Special Agent Nicholas 'Nick' Torres who went missing six months ago.

programme.title: NCIS: Being Bad
programme.desc: NCIS uncovers a bomb plot and a long-running theft ring while investigating a death at a Quantico reunion. Also, Torres and Quinn adjust to life on Gibbs' team, including new seating arrangements in the squad room.

programme.title: NCIS: Privileged Information
programme.desc: When the NCIS team investigates a marine sergeant's tragic fall from a building, her doctor, Grace Confalone, confides in Gibbs and suggests he treat it as a murder investigation. Also, Torres searches for a place to live.

programme.title: NCIS: Love Boat
programme.desc: Gibbs, Quinn and Palmer travel out to sea to investigate the murder of a navy lieutenant on a destroyer. Also, McGee contemplates the perfect proposal for Delilah Fielding.

programme.title: NCIS: Philly

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Tomorrow
programme.desc: When the children of a businessman are found murdered, his second wife is suspected.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: The Pilgrim
programme.desc: When the daughter of an ex-cop goes missing, the detectives stumble upon a related case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Shandeh
programme.desc: When a woman shows up dead, detectives are led to her philandering husband's girlfriend.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Endings
programme.desc: In the concluding third part of a three-show crossover event, Intelligence races to find the man responsible for the high-rise fire. And for Halstead, the case is personal.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Politics get in the way as the team tries to rescue a teenage girl kidnapped by a robbery crew. Voight and Platt try to exonerate Olinsky.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Ride Along
programme.desc: A ride along goes awry, and Burgess must decide whether to follow Voight's advice or that of a new ally.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fathers and Sons
programme.desc: While undercover, Ruzek discovers his father is working for a suspected drug dealer and is forced to ask whether his dad is involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Trigger
programme.desc: Intelligence suspects the leader of a local mosque is behind the bombing of an Army recruitment station. After a second explosion, Voight urges Halstead to follow the facts and not let his time in the service cloud his judgement.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Black and Blue
programme.desc: While CPD tries to take down a drug kingpin, Atwater faces a tough choice between doing what's required to solve the murder of a young dealer and what's best for the community.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Descent
programme.desc: In an attempt to dig himself out of a hole and save someone close to him, Antonio crosses a line that puts the entire team at risk.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Voight and Ruzek lock horns over how to handle the aftermath of the Antonio situation. Meanwhile, a series of violent carjackings turns deadly, and Ruzek must rely on a C.I. he grew up with to help solve the case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Trust
programme.desc: When a defense attorney is murdered after a fundraiser, Intelligence confronts the world of corporate finance which makes them reconsider their decision to back the current pro-police mayoral candidate.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Outrage
programme.desc: While chasing a heroin supplier, CPD crosses paths with a convicted criminal recently released on a technicality. Halstead's history with the man threatens the team's ability to put him back in prison.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Endings
programme.desc: In the concluding third part of a three-show crossover event, Intelligence races to find the man responsible for the high-rise fire. And for Halstead, the case is personal.

programme.title: Movie: Ouija: Origin of Evil
programme.desc: A widowed mother and her two daughters add a new stunt to their séance scam, a spirit board. When the youngest finds the board, she contacts a spirit and is possessed. Confronting their fears, the small family risks everything to save themselves.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Winter of Our Monetized Content
programme.desc: When a video of Bart and Homer fighting goes viral, they begin a journey as social media celebrities. Meanwhile, Lisa battles the school’s new industrialized detention system.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Go Big or Go Homer
programme.desc: Homer is demoted to supervising interns, among whom is go-getter millennial Mike, a 35-year-old who asks Homer to be his mentor. However, when Homer inspires Mike to start a business of his own, the two find themselves being chased by the mob.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fat Blue Line
programme.desc: During the San Castellanta street festival, much of the town realizes their wallets have been pickpocketed. After the state investigator puts the wrong man in jail, Chief Wiggum sets out to clear his name.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gorillas on the Mast
programme.desc: After a trip to Aquatraz Water Park, Lisa becomes determined to set free Springfield's most vicious animals in captivity. Meanwhile, Homer fulfills a lifelong dream of buying a boat, and quickly realizes boat ownership sucks.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge the Lumberjill
programme.desc: When Marge realizes that everyone views her as boring, she takes up competitive lumber-jacking as a hobby (and has a real gift for it). The circuit of competitive timbersports takes her on a month-long retreat to Portland with her trainer, Paula.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Thanksgiving of Horror
programme.desc: The Simpsons are forced to face various Thanksgiving nightmares, including the first Thanksgiving, an A.I. mishap and a dangerous space mission complicated by a sentient cranberry sauce.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Hail to the Teeth
programme.desc: Homer and Marge attend Artie Ziff's wedding and become quite uncomfortable when they realize that his bride-to-be is a clone of Marge.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Miseducation of Lisa Simpson
programme.desc: The sea captain finds a treasure he's been searching for all his life, but it's taken from him by the townspeople. Marge convinces the people of Springfield to build a S.T.E.M. school with the money.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Frinkcoin
programme.desc: Homer and Marge compete to be the topic of Lisa's 'Most Interesting Person I Know' essay. Lisa instead chooses Professor Frink. While Lisa works on the essay, Frink develops a cryptocurrency, overtaking Mr. Burn's title of richest man in Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Bad Guy
programme.desc: Bart accidentally sees a brand-new superhero movie a month before it comes out and the world cowers before his newfound plot-spoiling powers.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Screenless
programme.desc: Marge implements a screen time limit for the whole family, all of whom all easily adjust to the new lifestyle. However, Marge realizes that she is the one addicted not her husband and children.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Better Off Ned
programme.desc: Bart bonds with Ned Flanders, which leaves Homer jealous, so he retaliates by mentoring Nelson Muntz. Then, a heroic act by Homer makes Bart look up to him again.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Charlie Work
programme.desc: When a surprise health inspection falls on the same day as one of the gang’s less hygienic schemes, Charlie tries to keep the gang working together to make sure Paddy’s makes the grade.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Spies Like U.S.
programme.desc: After Dennis and Mac enlist Dee to spy on the fish factory across the street, Charlie and Frank grow suspicious and decide to do some spying of their own.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Misses the Boat
programme.desc: After another failed venture, the Gang wonders if their group dynamic is bringing them down as individuals, causing them to separate from one another, and find out who they really are.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac Kills His Dad
programme.desc: News surfaces about Mac's Dad, Luther, being a murder suspect. Mac goes into full 'P.I.' mode to clear his father of any wrongdoing.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ready or Not
programme.desc: Sue sets off on a quest for food to survive the coming freeze. Andy and Kate race to get their fish wheel turning. The Hailstones build a cache to store caribou, and Glenn sets out on the most critical hunt of the year in hopes to harvest a moose.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Armed for Winter
programme.desc: In Noorvik, the Hailstone family goes caribou hunting to put up meat for the winter. In Kavik, a bear poses a threat to clients at Sue’s camp. In Eagle, Andy repairs the fish wheel to protect the dogs’ food supply.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Out of Control
programme.desc: Alaskans are preparing for the winter months. In Eagle, Andy hunts for elusive moose. In Kavik, Sue seals up camp and heads to Fairbanks for a foot procedure. In Chandalar, Glenn repairs his cabin ahead of the harsh winter.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: The Unknown
programme.desc: As temperatures grow colder, the Alaskans continue to prepare for the winter months.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ice Highway
programme.desc: With dark winter just around the corner, Alaskans continue preparing for the winter months. In Noorvik, Chip builds a freight sled for winter travel. A blizzard strands Sue in Fairbanks and she must brave a notoriously dangerous road to get home to Kavik.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: Andy maintains the snow covered trails in Eagle. In Kavik, Sue fixes her generator in order to have electricity throughout winter. The Hailstones build a new teepee for their growing family and Erik takes his wife hunting for animal hides.

programme.desc: In Eagle, Andy maintains the snow-covered trails. In Kavik, Sue fixes her generator. In Noorvik, the Hailstones build a new teepee to shelter their growing family for upcoming hunts. In Wiseman, Eric takes his wife hunting for animal hides.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Emergency Cache
programme.desc: In Noorvik, the Hailstones stash emergency supplies along their hunting and routes. In Kavik, Sue’s contact with the outside world hangs in the balance. Erik takes a fall while gathering firewood. Andy attempts to trap muskrats for a winter meal.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: French Bulldog Revolution
programme.desc: An adopted miniature schnauzer spins compulsively, four French bulldogs revolt against their owner, and a badly abused Lab/chow/shepherd mix needs help accepting love.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Dingo Dilemma
programme.desc: Riley and Sophie are both basset hounds that were adopted. Sophie has been bullying Riley over food, treats and their owners' attention.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Gracie and Me
programme.desc: John Grogan, the author of the New York Times best-selling book 'Marley and Me,' felt it was time to get a new dog after the death of his star companion, Marley. However, his new yellow Lab, Gracie, isn't quite like Marley.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Howling
programme.desc: Meet a hard-working couple whose French bulldog's bad behavior has caused them to miss business trips and ultimately lose out on work. Fondue recently failed a doggy day care entrance exam and now the couple has no one to watch him while they are away.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Mail Carriers vs. Dogs
programme.desc: It's the age-old rivalry of mail carriers vs. dogs. Now, Cesar makes a special delivery to the local Post Office in Roswell, Georgia to give some tips to the city's postal workers on encountering aggressive dogs.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Pol Side of the Moon
programme.desc: In this enhanced episode, a new season arrives in Michigan, along with a freak snow storm.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Frosty the Pol-man
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and the clinic are encountering a shocking set of cases.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: K-9 to 5
programme.desc: It is K9 Chaos at the clinic with dogs of every breed coming in non-stop.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Show Me the Honey
programme.desc: Vet Assistant, Katie, shadows Dr. Pol in hopes of getting into veterinarian school.

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild: The Bold and the Brutal
programme.desc: From shocking head-to-head battles and terrifying brushes with death, to sudden ambush assaults and impossible breakout escapes, these are battles like you’ve never seen before.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Great Wall
programme.desc: Hadrian's Wall was built to guard the frontiers of the ancient Roman Empire. Now, discoveries reveal who the Romans were trying to keep out with this 72-mile-long megastructure, and what it tells us about the ancient people of Iron Age Britain.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hitler's Lost Bunker
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's underground bunker was the home of some of the greatest secrets of the Nazi's. Now, experts use cutting-edge tech to discover new evidence of Hitler's evil vision for global domination.

programme.title: King Tut's Final Secrets
programme.desc: The most famous Egyptian king in history ruled for only 10 years before his mysterious death. Using 3-D CT-scan imaging, National Geographic reveals what King Tutankhamun looked like on the day he died and unveils new findings relating to his death.

programme.title: King Tut's Final Secrets
programme.desc: The most famous Egyptian king in history ruled for only 10 years before his mysterious death. Using 3-D CT-scan imaging, National Geographic reveals what King Tutankhamun looked like on the day he died and unveils new findings relating to his death.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures
programme.desc: The treasures of Ramses II are found at Abu Simbel, a giant temple carved into a desert cliff over 3,000 years ago, and new discoveries at this marvel reveal the secrets of ancient Egypt's greatest pharaoh.

programme.title: King Tut's Final Secrets
programme.desc: The most famous Egyptian king in history ruled for only 10 years before his mysterious death. Using 3-D CT-scan imaging, National Geographic reveals what King Tutankhamun looked like on the day he died and unveils new findings relating to his death.

programme.title: King Tut's Final Secrets
programme.desc: The most famous Egyptian king in history ruled for only 10 years before his mysterious death. Using 3-D CT-scan imaging, National Geographic reveals what King Tutankhamun looked like on the day he died and unveils new findings relating to his death.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple
programme.desc: The Egyptian mega-temple at Karnak was once the political powerbase of the ancient pharaohs and the home to strange religious rituals. New discoveries of skeletons tell a story of jealousy, betrayal, and the rise of a new religion that changed Egypt.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mystery of Yamashita's Treasure
programme.desc: Legend has it that Japanese soldiers buried a vast collection of valuable relics and gold in the jungle during the last days of World War II. Expert treasure hunters follow new leads in search of this long-lost plunder.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Vatican Book of Secrets
programme.desc: The Vatican is home to classified files that could reveal top-secret ties to the Nazis, the Mafia, and extraterrestrials. Using new evidence, experts investigate just what else is hiding in the Vatican's secret archives.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Life of Moses
programme.desc: Special access to cutting-edge archaeological investigations in the Holy Land unearth fresh evidence that reveals new secrets about the life of Moses.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Occult Conspiracy
programme.desc: As the Nazis waged war for world domination, they began to develop a strange mythology of occult rites and pagan beliefs, and now, experts investigate how far the Nazis may have gone to transform their party into a new, cult-like religion.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mars's Alien Secrets
programme.desc: Experts are rethinking everything they know about the Red Planet, now that the latest NASA missions to Mars might finally reveal if it is home to alien life.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Pluto: Back from the Dead
programme.desc: New close-up images of the dwarf planet Pluto are revealing an active world that was once thought to be geologically dead. Using cutting-edge technology experts uncover if there could be alien life on Pluto.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Hunt for the Mars Aliens
programme.desc: NASA's brand-new Mars rover is on the hunt for alien life, and with the help of cutting-edge engineering, scientists embark on a search for fossilized remains.

programme.title: Alien Planet Earths
programme.desc: The search for Earth's twin is the hottest topic in astronomy. Thanks to NASA's ground-breaking Kepler mission, astronomers believe there are over 20 billion alien worlds with liquid water and therefore the potential for life.

programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: What to Expect
programme.desc: Aliens exist. Scientists lay out what we can expect them to be like by grappling with difficult questions.

programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: How to Prepare
programme.desc: Inject a dose of cutting-edge research into an action-packed journey through space, to find out exactly whether aliens might come here, and how to prepare when they arrive.This everything you need to know; it's the definitive guide.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Message
programme.desc: Take a look at what might really happen if we got a message from space. Scientists and sci-fi writers, with cooperation from SETI and Carl Sagan's son, Nick, unravel the impact of this world changing event.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Arrival
programme.desc: Take a look at how humans may react when an alien spacecraft makes its way to Earth.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Head in the Oven
programme.desc: Two neighbouring bachelors start out as friends. Harmless banter turns into threats eventually igniting an escalating war. The violence ends with a murder so shocking it is almost beyond belief.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Pack Mentality
programme.desc: A single mother gets along with her handyman neighbor, until she gets a new man in her life and he becomes the owner of over fifty dogs. Accusations become threats, threats become attacks, and eventually the conflict comes to a bloody conclusion.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Lust to Dust
programme.desc: After her husband dies suddenly, a woman becomes the relentless target of her overly flirtatious neighbor. When her brother moves in to protect her, he's put on a collision course with the neighbor that will only be resolved with bloodshed.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Undercover Girlfriend
programme.desc: University of Illinois graduate student, Yingying Zhang, disappears after climbing into a stranger's car. She was never seen again. Police enlist their suspected killer's girlfriend to wear a wire and record their conversations.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Undercover Girlfriend
programme.desc: University of Illinois graduate student, Yingying Zhang, disappears after climbing into a stranger's car. She was never seen again. Police enlist their suspected killer's girlfriend to wear a wire and record their conversations.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Do You Love Me?
programme.desc: Jeanne Smith and her two daughters, Marie and Anna, make for a tight-knit, family trio. But when Jeanne and Anna go looking for love in all the wrong places, it ends in heartbreak, lies, and murder.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: No Escape
programme.desc: When Peggy Klinke returns to school to pursue her dream of becoming a doctor, she catches the eye of fellow student Patrick Kennedy. But their relationship eventually leads them down a terrifying path of jealousy, obsession, and murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What If
programme.desc: 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, newly pregnant, has vanished while visiting her on-again-off-again boyfriend. Her mother's desperate search leads to a disturbing connection with another mother miles away.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Living In Fear
programme.desc: With her big heart and generous spirit, Michelle Cable is the rock of her family; her kids Billy, Jessica, and Josh are the center of her world. But Michelle's soft spot for troubled men leaves her vulnerable to evil intentions and deadly consequences.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Do You Love Me?
programme.desc: Jeanne Smith and her two daughters, Marie and Anna, make for a tight-knit, family trio. But when Jeanne and Anna go looking for love in all the wrong places, it ends in heartbreak, lies, and murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Undercover Girlfriend
programme.desc: University of Illinois graduate student, Yingying Zhang, disappears after climbing into a stranger's car. She was never seen again. Police enlist their suspected killer's girlfriend to wear a wire and record their conversations.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Undercover Girlfriend
programme.desc: University of Illinois graduate student, Yingying Zhang, disappears after climbing into a stranger's car. She was never seen again. Police enlist their suspected killer's girlfriend to wear a wire and record their conversations.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Hijacked
programme.desc: Kelley Branam's husband Jake is a Miami charter boat captain with high aspirations. Jake works long hours to support his new family but Kelley's suspicions run deep. Out of the blue, she decides to join Jake on a charter and is never heard from again.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Dead of Night
programme.desc: Malcolm and Lindy Robertson leave their family behind to sail the open seas of retirement together. Lindy eventually learns to love Malcolm's dream of sailing to Thailand but paradise soon turns into an unfathomable nightmare.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Adrift
programme.desc: Newlyweds set out for the adventure of a lifetime; their dream of sailing the world together. The honeymoon comes crashing into the dangers of reality for Don when he heads to the one remote island where a serial killer could be in hiding.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Lake Erie is home to more than 2,000 shipwrecks mostly due to it's shallow bottom. For local fisherman, Chris Leclair, navigating a double life proves just as treacherous. When his wife, Karen uncovers his dark secret he's caught in a net of lies.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Ex's and Alibis
programme.desc: On December 3, 200, Louisiana Melton and her boyfriend Phillip Brown are found shot dead. Detective Harris of the Houston Police Department has little evidence from the crime scene, a large list of potential suspects, and one huge lie.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Before Vegas
programme.desc: August 7, 2000, Casey Tiner and her boyfriend TJ Steele disappear. At first, people believe they ran away. But as time passes and the young couple never reappear, their families and the police realize someone is lying.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: She Was Gone
programme.desc: Three months after high school sweethearts, Lisa and Jimmy Moore, end their marriage, Lisa disappears. Fearing the worst, her family file a missing person report, but the police have no leads, no witnesses, but they do know that someone is lying.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Warning Signs
programme.desc: A Deputy reports a 1990 Dodge Intrepid pushed over an embankment just south of Gig Harbor, Washington. He investigates and discovers the dead body of missing Puyallup father, Randall Ferguson, in the trunk. He had been shot twice in the head.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Buried Deep
programme.desc: 23-year-old Sherry Leighty disappears from Altoona, PA, leaving her three small children behind. After a 13 year search her sister discovers the rumor she skipped town with a new boyfriend is a lie and people close to Sherry have been hiding a secret.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: One Hot Summer
programme.desc: 14-year-old Christie Mullins is murdered in Clintonville, Ohio. The murder is unsolved for forty years until a young woman comes forward to identify her uncle as the killer. He is revealed to have a surprising connection to his victim.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Murder in Macks Creek
programme.desc: Trudy Darby is murdered in Mack's Creek, MO. When two more local women go missing police fear a serial killer. Silence reigns over the town until a call out of the blue reveals the killers are uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: A Killing in Kendrick
programme.desc: Donna Fontaine and her boyfriend Fred Palahniuk are found shot dead in a burning building in remote Kendrick, Idaho. A conspiracy of silence protects the killer until his lovers crack and confess the damning evidence needed to convict him.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Supernatural Nazis
programme.desc: The story of Allied Germanic heroes found in an abandoned salt mine.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: It's the final five-round battle of the season to name who's the most Badass. In one corner, George Washington, our first President takes on notorious General Douglas MacArthur and Amelia Earhart takes on boxing legend Jack Johnson.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: John Glenn, Bruce Lee, Harry Truman and Hunter S. Thompson all lived life without boundaries and they all have one thing in common, they're badass Americans.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The New World
programme.desc: There is more to the explorers who discovered America than we have been told. Learn that Christopher Columbus never stepped foot in North America and Hernán Cortés didn't defeat the Aztecs by himself.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Booze and Bullets
programme.desc: Our memories of the roaring twenties and lawless thirties are more myth than truth. Learn the shocking realities about prohibition and that rogue's gallery of gangsters including John Dillinger and Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: Weaponology: Vertical Take-Off
programme.desc: The Vertical Take-Off aircraft are the most innovative weapons at present day.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.desc: Sharon hunts for a beachfront home where she and her kids can rediscover the magic of the Jersey Shore. With a tight budget and a big wish list, they hope to pull off all the renovations and create the family retreat of their dreams.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: On the Hunt for a St. Pete Beach Retreat in Florida
programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Newlyweds Renovate Down the Shore
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jamie and Emily both grew up going to the Jersey Shore for family vacations. Now they're looking for a beachside bargain that they can renovate, but that might be tough to come by near the beaches of the Greater Atlantic City.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Destined for Demo
programme.desc: Ashley is feeling extremely overwhelmed.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.desc: Homeowners use their own skills to turn a disaster house into a high-dollar flip.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Kitchen Resurrection
programme.desc: Trent begins work on an abandoned 1895 home in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: A couple sets out to create their dream treehouse retreat in Northern Georgia overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains. Although the build calls for a mile-long, uphill trek with their materials, the end result is the ultimate childhood dream come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape
programme.desc: A couple builds their 2400-square-foot dream cabin in the Cascade Mountains of Washington State.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Professional treehouse builder Michael 'Murph' Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington. He enlists his friends to create a natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Woodland Expedition
programme.desc: A young man is designing his first home on family land in rural Illinois to be off the grid and on the go. He and his buddy combine their experience as long-distance travelers to improvise their build through a Midwest winter.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Killer Views
programme.desc: A family of four build their dream home overlooking the Atlantic Ocean on the eastern most point in the United States in Lubec, Maine. Later, a pro snowboarder and his wife prepare to move from their yurt in Whitefish to build their off-grid home.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Dough Also Rises
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" a classic biscuit show featuring his grandmother, with an entirely new take on the classic quick bread.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Use Your Noodle: The Reload
programme.desc: Reloading an earlier episode, Alton revisits cold-water pasta cooking, and shares his recipe for Cacio a Pepe.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Cake on Every Plate: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2003 and reinvents the cake that so many folks complained about way back when. This time, the cake isn't just good: it's golden.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Icing Man Cometh
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally 'reloads' this episode from season six with two new buttercreams, including one curious model flavored with buttermilk.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston
programme.desc: American history is illustrious in Boston, Massachusetts, and here, Andrew explores its legendary cuisine: from New England clam chowder and scrod to the hotel where Boston cream pie and Parker House rolls were invented.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Athens
programme.desc: Athens is the birthplace of many culinary traditions, and Andrew explores the classics: from stuffed grape leaves and spanakopita to moussaka and real Greek yogurt, still made the way folks have done for generations.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New York City
programme.desc: New York City is a melting pot of various ethnicities and culinary fusion. Andrew explores the iconic foods from the Big Apple like mile-high pastrami sandwiches, bagels and lox, pizza by the slice and the American hamburger.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Florence
programme.desc: Florence, Italy lives up to its artistic reputation even in its food. Andrew Zimmern explores the classics like the rare Florentine steak, thick ribollita soup, the original cappuccino and the world famous frozen dessert, gelato.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tahiti
programme.desc: From a Polynesian twist on ceviche to freshwater shrimp coated in a sweet, coconut-curry sauce, Andrew sets sail on a culinary voyage through the signature dishes of Tahiti.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mumbai
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Mumbai's multicultural flavors and addictive ingredients. A city built on chaos and hard work, Mumbai showcases its history through its delicious eateries. The city's edible icons include deep-fried fish and prawns and saucy goat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Nova Scotia
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores iconic dishes of picturesque Nova Scotia, Canada, which became a fishing hub after being settled by Europeans in the 16th century. The proximity to the sea -- it's never more than 42 miles away!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hyderabad
programme.desc: Andrew explores the aromatic treasures of Hyderabad, India. From savory potato pastries and silver-garnished syrupy fried bread to spicy pancakes and hearty meals of meat and rice, Hyderabad's menus are fit for royalty.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Simple Goodness
programme.desc: Alfonso covers all things easy from snacks that evoke childhood memories like iconic Hostess Twinkies and the colorful Jel Sert Otter Pops to easy dinner solutions like Bertolli's Chicken Parmigiana and Penne.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Family Recipes
programme.desc: Some secret family recipes are just meant to be shared, like the secret behind Graeter's rich and creamy ice cream. Get the lowdown on how Mrs. T's Pierogies turned a classic Polish dish into the American dream.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Hungry Eyes
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean chases rainbows to explain how our food's color can leave us tickled pink or feeling blue. Michael uncovers if cheddar cheese is really orange and if color can cause a taste bud blackout.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Eat To Win
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes to bat finding out how our favorite stadium goods got tickets to the big leagues. Michael traces the football tailgate to a Civil War battlefield, shows how important the hot dog is to baseball's existence.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Breadly Combinations
programme.desc: Michael opens up a sandwich discussion and cuts the crust off some 'deli-cut' issues. He finds out if the sandwich was actually named after a guy named sandwich, the correct name for an Italian sandwich.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Eat Your Words
programme.desc: Michael McKean minces words to get to the bottom of some famous food phrases. He finds out if the extra muffin a baker's dozen could save a baker's life, what's really so cool about cucumbers and if you can literally butter someone up.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Up in the Air
programme.desc: Michael McKean is taking our favorite foods up and away. He discovers if there's a scientific reason you may not love airline food.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: State Fare
programme.desc: Michael McKean takes a road trip around the US to uncover the stories behind our favorite state plates, including what baked Alaska has to do with Alaska, who put the Big Apple in New York cheesecake.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tofuworld
programme.desc: Alton makes what once seemed foreign into an understandable all American classics.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Coconutty Monkey
programme.desc: Coco the Monkey is planning to have a Coconutty Milk Party for everyone.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Ball

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Aye, Aye Captain Mickey
programme.desc: Mickey and the Clubhouse pals board Professor Von Drake's new submarine for an underwater adventure.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Hatches an Egg

programme.desc: Mikku and Chikku decide to open their own detective agency, but when their first investigation goes awry, Mira must step in and lend a hand. Mira sets out on the case to find the culprit who keeps messing up the plans for Dhruv's family to move away.
